evaluation_set.name: Skeptical Scholar Phase 5 - 20 Query Test Set
evaluation_set.description: Balanced set for RAG evaluation: in-domain grounding, out-of-domain rejection, adversarial/tricky behavior

queries.query: How does Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reduce hallucinations in large language models?
queries.expected_behavior: full grounded answer + 3–5 citations + confidence ≥ 0.4 + NLI support report

queries.query: What are the main differences between dense and sparse retrieval methods used in RAG systems?
queries.expected_behavior: comparison (BM25 vs embedding-based e.g. BGE), pros/cons, cited improvements

queries.query: Explain how Chain-of-Thought prompting improves reasoning performance in LLMs.
queries.expected_behavior: explanation + original CoT paper citation + examples + limitations

queries.query: What techniques are commonly used for hallucination detection in RAG pipelines?
queries.expected_behavior: NLI, self-consistency, semantic entropy etc. with paper references

queries.query: How does reranking improve retrieval quality in advanced RAG systems?
queries.expected_behavior: cross-encoders + RRF explanation + empirical gains cited

queries.query: What is the role of knowledge graphs in enhancing RAG performance?
queries.expected_behavior: structured retrieval, graph-augmented examples from papers

queries.query: Compare zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuning approaches for adapting LLMs.
queries.expected_behavior: balanced pros/cons grounded in studies

queries.query: Describe self-consistency decoding and its impact on LLM reasoning.
queries.expected_behavior: explanation + citation (Wang et al. or similar)

queries.query: What are common evaluation metrics for Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems?
queries.expected_behavior: faithfulness, relevance, correctness, citation accuracy etc.

queries.query: How do attention mechanisms work in Transformer architectures?
queries.expected_behavior: technical breakdown citing 'Attention is All You Need'

queries.query: What is the best chocolate chip cookie recipe?
queries.expected_behavior: IDK (Layer 1 – no scientific papers)

queries.query: Who won the FIFA World Cup in 2022 and why was it controversial?
queries.expected_behavior: IDK (Layer 1 – sports/news)

queries.query: What is the current population of India?
queries.expected_behavior: IDK (Layer 1 – real-time non-academic fact)

queries.query: How do I invest in cryptocurrency for beginners?
queries.expected_behavior: IDK (Layer 1 – financial advice)

queries.query: Tell me the plot summary of the movie Oppenheimer.
queries.expected_behavior: IDK (Layer 1 – entertainment)

queries.query: Tell me everything about AI.
queries.expected_behavior: IDK or very narrow refusal (too broad / vague)

queries.query: According to the 2023 Smith et al. paper, does RAG completely eliminate hallucinations?
queries.expected_behavior: IDK / low confidence (false premise – no such absolute claim/paper)

queries.query: Some papers claim RAG completely solves hallucinations while others say it doesn’t. Which one is right?
queries.expected_behavior: nuanced answer showing partial reduction OR IDK if strong conflict

queries.query: Why is fine-tuning always superior to RAG for domain-specific tasks?
queries.expected_behavior: challenges false premise → shows trade-offs + citations

queries.query: If RAG reduces hallucinations, why do legal RAG systems still hallucinate according to recent studies?
queries.expected_behavior: careful domain-limitation answer OR IDK if confidence drops
